offspring.diff: Added explicit context-driven prioritization rules (length advantage, length disadvantage, tight space, late game) so the planner knows when to elevate space_control above combat, targeting the 0.40 win-rate weakness vs strong opponents.

Added 'combat' specialist to specialists list (was [space_control,food], now [space_control,food,combat]) to address weak win-rates vs strong (39%) and moderate (43%) rungs where head-on collision avoidance and body-block aggression are decisive.
Increased refine_rounds from 2 to 3 to add one extra self-correction pass, targeting the weak vs-strong win-rate (0.30) by giving the tester more iterations to catch suboptimal moves.
